title: SBA Communications (SBAC) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value model for SBA Communications using a discounted cash flow methodology with an estimated cost of equity based on a 0.0900 discount rate and long-term inflation.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: Estimated long-term FCF growth of 0.04 based on stable REIT leasing agreements.
assumptions.discountRate: Cost of equity calculated via CAPM at 0.0900.
